content.question:
Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

1. I am seeing (see) a dentist about a filling I ___ (need).

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

2. Workers at that factory ___ (be) on strike since Tuesday.

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

3. They won't employ him as he ___ (not / have) any experience.

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive. For multiple blanks, separate your answers with a comma and a space, e.g.: do, does)

4. "What ___ (you / do)?" "I ___ (think) about my plans for Christmas."

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

5. "Why is the room stuffy?" "Because too many people ___ (smoke) in here."

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

6. In spite of our doubts, he ___ (seem) to have been right.

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive.)

7. She ___ (see) that boy for six months even though her parents disapprove.

Put the verbs in brackets into the "Simple Present", "Present Continuous", "Present Perfect" and "Present Perfect Continuous".
(Requirement: Do not use contractions. Answers are not case-sensitive. For multiple blanks, separate your answers with a comma and a space, e.g.: do, does)

8. Hot air balloons ___ (work) on the principle that heat ___ (rise).
